feed.title: Vala Programming Language - Blog
feed.subtitle: Vala is an object-oriented programming language with a self-hosting compiler that generates C code and uses the GObject type system.

entry.title: ValaBot: an AI coding assistant fine-tuned for Vala
entry.summary: An AI coding assistant fine-tuned for Vala and Gtk

entry.title: Vala: the smoothest C off-ramp
entry.summary: Using Vala to rewrite old C code

entry.title: print("Hello Planet GNOME");
entry.summary: Posts from the Vala blog are now appearing on Planet GNOME!

entry.title: Vala 0.56
entry.summary: Here's what's new in Vala release version 0.56
